# Angers

> Geotechnical engineering company in France, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amelioration](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/amelioration/)
- [Analyse Damplification Sismique](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-damplification-sismique/)
- [Analyse Geotechnique Tunnels Sols](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-geotechnique-tunnels-sols/)
- [Analyse Lerosion Sols](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-lerosion-sols/)
- [Analyse Stabilite Pentes](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-stabilite-pentes/)
- [Analyse Tassement Differentiel](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/analyse-tassement-differentiel/)
- [Au Dilatometre Plat](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/au-dilatometre-plat/)
- [Caracterisation Sols Residuels](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/caracterisation-sols-residuels/)
- [Cisaillement Au Scissometre Chantier](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/cisaillement-au-scissometre-chantier/)
- [Classification Sols](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/classification-sols/)
- [Conception Chaussee Plate Forme](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-chaussee-plate-forme/)

- [Conception Deep Soil Mixing](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Conception Disolation Sismique A](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-disolation-sismique-a/)
- [Conception Drains Verticaux Prefabriques](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-drains-verticaux-prefabriques/)

- [Conception Fondations Superficielles](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-fondations-superficielles/)
- [Conception Micropieux](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-micropieux/)
- [Conception Murs Soutenement](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-murs-soutenement/)

- [Conception Rideaux Palplanches](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/conception-rideaux-palplanches/)
- [Densite Site](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/densite-site/)
- [Essais In Situ](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/essais-in-situ/)
- [Etude Mecanique Sols](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/etude-mecanique-sols/)
- [Evaluation Sols Affaissables](https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/evaluation-sols-affaissables/)

## Contact
- Website: https://angers.geotechnique.sbs/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in France.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
